prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to england and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This statistical commentary specifically details the stock of non-domestic properties and their rateable values for England and Wales, emphasizing the data for England, including statistics on property counts, regional distributions, and sector breakdowns pertinent to the English rating system.
